titleStmt.title: SII 8.646: original edition by K.V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 646. (A.R. No. 337 of 1903). ON THE SAME BASE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakesarivanma ṟku yāṇṭu 10vatu teṉkarai tevatāṉa brahmadeya maṟiñciyaccaturvve timaṅkalattu maṟavaṉicarattu perumāṉaṭikaḷukku Ivvūr peru
ṅkuṟi sabhai yom cempiyaṉ Irukkuveḷārāna pūti parāntakaṉār teviyarāna coḻapperuṉteviyārāṉa peṟaṉaṅkai tiruppiṟaṉta nāḷ sūryyagrah(ā)ṇamāha Uda kampaṇṇi perumāṉaṭikaḷ mele
ṟṟiṉa māṟṟili cempoṉ Āyirat teṇpatin kaḻañcu Āticaṇḍiśa r tirukkaiyāṟ tirakkoṇṭu śantrādi ttavarai Upaiyam celutta Oṭṭikuṭutta Ūṟpaṭi nilam 3- Iṉāl kuḻi patinālāyiramum Amutu tiruviḻā
Aṟcaṉaikaḷukku nivanta maṭaittukkoḷḷa Iṟai yum Eccoṟum veṭṭi vetiṉaiyum Eṟpeṟpaṭṭaṉavum Iṟaiyili Iṟuttukkuṭukka Icaintu nālusi maiyum vakuti kuṟittu cāṭ piṭittukkoṇṭu poṉṉukku
kuṭutta nilattukku kiḻpāṟkellai maturān=ta kavatikku meṟkun teṉpāṟkellai Ipperumānaṭikaḷ tevatānattu cūlakkal varampukku vaṭakkum melpāṟkellai naṅkaikuṭip perumāṉaṭikaḷ tevatāṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟkel
lai poṉṉoṭai paramecura nilattukkut teṟkun totavattivatikku kiḻakku paramecura vākkālukkut teṟku kiḻpāṟkellai Ipperumāṉaṭikaḷ tevatāṉattu cuṟṟu vākkālukku meṟkun teṟkellai cipūti
vākkālukkut teṟku Ivvicainta perunāṉkellaiyi lakappaṭṭa Uṇnilam Uḻiviṉṟi Iṉnila Ūṟpaṭa muṉṟaraikkum Ipperumāṉaṭika ḷiṟaiaṟiyakkaṭavarillarākavum . Iṟaikāṭṭiṉārait taṇṭam paṉmā
heśva rar Iṉnila maṟintu Āyiram poṉ koṇṭum Iṉnila miṟaiyil Aṉupovikkap poṉ ṉupaiyaṅkoṇṭu kūṭṭak kuṟaivaṟak kūṭiiruntu paṇippaṇiyāl paṇittu kalmel veṭṭikkuṭuttom IvvaṟiñciyaA few letters are wanting at the end.
Digital edition of SII 8.646 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Dorotea Operato.
